title: Soil sample(Citizen scientists, Chinese)
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6ott0","text":"鏟子*1","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a0nnh","text":"HDPE塑膠罐*1","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"30alj","text":"乾燥劑*1","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1o6ho","text":"採集紀錄紙*1","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"79cpe","text":"塑膠袋*1","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"70g9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 選定地點，分為以下三種 醫院 公園 天然地區
移除表土，取距離土表5~7公分之處的土，裝入塑膠夾鏈袋中
將塑膠袋中的土均勻混合，倒入HDPE塑膠罐之中 罐子裡有乾燥劑，記得將標籤紙放入罐子中
最後拍兩張照片 %s %s 第一張照片：樣張 第二張照片：樣張
creator: Hsin-Mao Wu
